title: antlema #0502
definition:
1) what is drawn
 2) the act of drawing water
 3) a thing to draw with, e.g. bucket and rope let down into a well
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) what is drawn
 2) the act of drawing water
 3) a thing to draw with, e.g. bucket and rope let down into a well

    NASB:  a container to draw with:
